title: Sieves and Strainers Set – 3 Pack Stainless Steel Fine Mesh Sieve (7cm, 12cm, 18cm) | Rust Free, Dishwasher Safe, Flour Sifter for Baking & Cooking
features: MADE FROM STAINLESS STEEL- Küche Mania's sives for cooking makes it strong and durable with a long life span. The material won't corrode or rust over time as other brands do. You can rest assured that your kitchen tools will be in great shape for many years to come

STRONG AND STURDY HANDLES - Our set of metal sieve with handle is sturdy and lightweight. Its innovative design ensures that these versatile pieces are perfect for any task around the kitchen. Whether it's a simple saucepan with clumps stuck on the bottom mixed up by your spatula, an easy way to strain out liquid from vegetables after cooking
RUST FREE STRAINERS - The sieve fine mesh features an anti-rust design.They are also dishwasher safe, but we recommend hand washing them to keep them in top condition.
NO SHARP EDGES - We've designed our set of metal mesh sieves with no sharp edges so that they're safe for everyone in your family. You don't have to worry about getting cut or hurt while cooking.

AFFORDABLE 3 PCS SET - Küche Mania's sieves for cooking are the best value for your money. This set of sieves are made to last and will not rust or corrode over time. The stainless steel mesh is strong enough to withstand any kitchen task you throw at it.
description: Product Description RUST RESISTANT Specially designed for sifting food in the kitchen, the Sieve Strainer is made from durable stainless steel to withstand tough use. It will not rust if left even in saltwater or other corrosive environments. Our unmatched attention to detail makes it easy to clean and will have you finally left with aching hands-free of worry. ROUNDED EDGES This sleek kitchen accessory will look perfectly beautiful in any home kitchen setting while elegantly performing its function. It has no dangerous sharp edges so there is never a need to worry about scratching the nonstick finish on skillets or expensive cookware. Rounded edges means it’s safe for dishwashers too! FINE MESH Battle food particles with a better kitchen Sieve Strainer. Experience superior strain and separation of foods with this fine mesh cooking strainer. Treat your family to great-looking dishes without any annoying bits or severing through the veggies, potatoes, noodles, beans etcetera. Easy to strain, easy to clean! ERGONOMIC HANDLE Ideal for kitchen worktop cooking and garnishing, this classic kitchen utensil will be the hero of your culinary efforts. The ergonomic handle reduces your hand strain while providing comfort when using it to drain or add texture to sauces that require draining out liquids. Made of stainless steel with a plastic hoop for hanging next to pots on the stove.
